html:
<button class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-400 to-pink-400 hover:from-purple-500 hover:to-pink-500 text-white shadow-lg px-6 py-3 text-base dark:from-purple-600 dark:to-pink-600 sm:px-6 sm:py-3 sm:text-base">
  Click me
</button>
description: A playful style button component with dark mode support and responsive design
customizations: Adjust padding with px-* py-* classes
Modify colors using bg-* and text-* utilities
Add icons using flex and space-x-* utilities
